title: Createmon Server Modpack
description: A modpack for the Createmon MC server, adding Create, Cobblemon and performance mods!
body:
A modpack blending Create and Cobblemon, and enhances graphics and performance.

### Performance + visuals
This modpack adds some performance and visual enhancement mods, such as **Sodium**, **Jade** and **Iris**. This modpack comes with the shader **Complimentary Unbound**, which balances performance and wonderful visuals.

### Seamless integration
This modpack provides seamless integration between mods, including **Cobblemon: Create Industries**...and basically the rest are addons/misc mods. But it integrates well nevertheless! You can make your own Pokéball factory or make a small town with a Create-themed Pokémon center and a Pokémon-themed iron factory!

### Play with your friends
With **Essential Mod**, you and your friends can join on your favorite singleplayer worlds! You can also join on the official server at **createmon.playit.game**! Note that the server is still work in progress, and things may not function correctly, and may be out of date with the modpack. Also, if you are wanting to join the server, **DO NOT UPDATE ANY MODS!**

### Using NeoForge 1.21.1
The Createmon Server Modpack is built off of the NeoForge mod loader, which has a cleaner technical layout than Forge and offers higher performance. Although it may not be as fast as Fabric, it is the newest modloader and has a good amount of mods.

### Issues?
Report them in [this anonymous Google form!](https://forms.gle/v6DDwLuiibtWjgCV9)

**This is currently work in progress and may or may not work if you update any mods.**
